zh.Bramshall, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾布拉姆沙拉爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Dunham II於1348年8月4日出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Sir Robert Dunham30歲，母親Elizabeth de Stafford26歲。他於1381年與Elizabeth Margaret Sandford在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1439年12月31日在他的家鄉享年91歲。

zh-hans.Bramshall, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾布拉姆沙拉爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Dunham II于1348年8月4日出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Sir Robert Dunham30岁，母亲Elizabeth de Stafford26岁。他于1381年与Elizabeth Margaret Sandford在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1439年12月31日在他的家乡享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dunham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Dunham (Norfolk, Nottinghamshire, Cheshire). Most are named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + hām ‘homestead’. A place in Lincolnshire now known as Dunholme appears in the Domesday Book as Duneham and this too serves as a source of the surname; here the first element is probably the Old English personal name Dunna. Dunham is often difficult to tell apart from Downham .
History: John Dunham (1590–1668) was a Puritan linen weaver who came to Plymouth, MA, via Leiden, the Netherlands, in 1633. He had many prominent descendants.

variants.name: Downham
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Downham in Cambridgeshire, Essex, Norfolk, Suffolk, and Lancashire, and perhaps also from Downham, Northumberland, and Downholme, North Yorkshire, though no evidence has been found for these. The names from Lancashire and Northumberland arise from Old English dūn, dative plural dūnum ‘(at) the hills’, while the others come from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Dunham II was born on 4 August 1348, in Devon, England, his father, Sir Robert Dunham, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth de Stafford, was 26. He married Elizabeth Margaret Sandford in 1381, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 31 December 1439, in his hometown, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Dunham II est né le 4 août 1348, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Dunham, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Stafford, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Margaret Sandford en 1381, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1439, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Dunham II am 4. August 1348 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Dunham 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Stafford 26. Er hat 1381 in Devon, England Elizabeth Margaret Sandford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Dezember 1439 im Alter von 91 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Dunham II è nato il il 4 agosto 1348 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Dunham, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Stafford, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Margaret Sandford nel 1381, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 31 dicembre 1439, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.Devonshire,England: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Dunham IIが1348年8月4日にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Dunhamは30歳，母Elizabeth de Staffordは26歳であった。1381年にイギリスデボンでElizabeth Margaret Sandfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1439年12月31日に故郷で91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Dunham II(이)가 1348년 8월 4일 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Dunham(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Stafford(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1381년 영국 데폰에서 Elizabeth Margaret Sandford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1439년 12월 31일 그의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.4. August 1348–31 December 1439: 1348 оны Наймдугаар сарын 4–1439 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 31

pt.4. August 1348–31 December 1439: 4 de agosto de 1348–31 de dezembro de 1439
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Dunham II nasceu em 4 de agosto de 1348, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Dunham, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Stafford, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Margaret Sandford em 1381, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1439, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Dunham II родился 4 августа 1348 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Dunham было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Stafford, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Margaret Sandford в 1381 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 31 декабря 1439 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 91 год.

es.4. August 1348–31 December 1439: 4 de agosto de 1348–31 de diciembre de 1439
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Dunham II nació el 4 de agosto de 1348, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Dunham, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Stafford, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Margaret Sandford en 1381, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 31 de diciembre de 1439, en su pueblo, a la edad de 91 años.
